title: About WhatTheStack
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(o){const r={h3:"h3",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...o.components},{ConferenceDate:i,ConferenceLocation:a,GeneralContactEmail:s}=r;return i||_missingMdxReference("ConferenceDate",!0),a||_missingMdxReference("ConferenceLocation",!0),s||_missingMdxReference("GeneralContactEmail",!0),t(e,{children:[t(r.h3,{children:["A by-developers, for-developers event in ",n(a,{})," on ",n(i,{})]}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Most of us in this game tend to be on the wallflower side of the spectrum. Still, you can't deny the (very obvious) benefits of having a community to support and cheer for you."}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"WhatTheStack, for us, is the culmination of combined 20 years of community building efforts. We love going to conferences, meeting new people, learning new things...but sometimes, we get this feeling that these kinds of events are starting to get a bit too formal for our community culture. That's why we decided to make our own conference with blackjack and...Ha, got you. We decided to make a conference that won't be just ours. A conference that will be made by the passion of all the people who will attend WhatTheStack? So, hackers, developers, platform engineers, AI researchers, startup founders, and whatever title you choose (or may have been chosen for you)... welcome."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["WhatTheStack is a conference. Surprising, we know. More importantly, it's a single-day, multi-track event that aims to celebrate technology, the web platform, AI, infrastructure and everything else that makes the modern stack what it is. It's never going to be the kind that expects a dress code of you. It's also ",n(r.strong,{children:"stacked"})," with (pun very much intended) with authentic experiences, which may involve, but are not limited to:"]}),"
",t(r.ul,{children:["
",t(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Epic talks"})," - And not just by the big names, but the folks who genuinely love the craft. Expect authentic, genuine insights on the entire spectrum from familiar faces you know from the internet and newcomers alike (which you'll probably know on the internet in a few years anyway)."]}),"
",t(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Coffee"})," - Yes, we have it. Yes, it's good."]}),"
",t(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Beers and Chill"})," - Because let's face it, the best ideas sometimes come over a cold brew (and we mean beer this time). Or, y'know, just stick around for the chill part - soda's good too!"]}),"
",t(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Gourmet Grub"})," - C'mon, it's the Balkans. We know how to do food. Trust us, you'll try it and love it. You'll be back."]}),"
",t(r.li,{children:[n(r.strong,{children:"Community Vibes"})," - This is where you'll find your tribe. Whether you're flying solo or rolling with your crew, you're among friends here. We're all about the vibes."]}),"
"]}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["The ultimate goal for WhatTheStack is to become your yearly go-to conference. Since we're not we're not in the business of ",n("code",{class:"bg-base-100 px-2 py-0.5 rounded text-secondary-300 border border-secondary-500/30",children:"Promise"}),"s (pun also very much intended), here's what we'll deliver:"]}),"
",t(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"The epic talks mentioned above"}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Coffee, beer, amazing food"}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Great community and even better vibes"}),"
"]}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["... wait, you're still not convinced? Okay, fair enough. Shoot us a message at ",n(s,{})," or on any of our social media profiles."]}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["Alternatively: ",n("br",{})]})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?n(t,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};function _missingMdxReference(e,n){throw new Error("Expected "+(n?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}

title: Code of Conduct
content:
const{Fragment:n,jsx:e,jsxs:i}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(o){const r={a:"a",h1:"h1",h3:"h3",li:"li",p:"p",ul:"ul",...o.components};return i(n,{children:[e(r.h1,{children:"Code of Conduct"}),"
",e(r.p,{children:"Citizen Code of Conduct"}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"1. Purpose"}),"
",e(r.p,{children:"A primary goal of WhatTheStack is to be inclusive to the largest number of contributors, with the most varied and diverse backgrounds possible. We are committed to providing a friendly, safe and welcoming environment for all."}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"2. Open [Source/Culture/Tech] Citizenship"}),"
",e(r.p,{children:"Our supplemental goal is to increase open [source/culture/tech] citizenship by encouraging participants to recognize and strengthen the relationships between our actions and their effects on our community."}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"3. Expected Behavior"}),"
",i(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:"Participate in an authentic and active way."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Exercise consideration and respect in your speech and actions."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Attempt collaboration before conflict."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Refrain from demeaning, discriminatory, or harassing behavior and speech."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Be mindful of your surroundings and of your fellow participants."}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"4. Unacceptable Behavior"}),"
",e(r.p,{children:"The following behaviors are considered harassment and are unacceptable:"}),"
",i(r.ul,{children:["
",e(r.li,{children:"Violence, threats, or violent language."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Discriminatory jokes and language."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Posting sexually explicit or violent material."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Doxing (posting private identifying information)."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Personal insults."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Inappropriate photography or recording."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Inappropriate physical contact (consent is required)."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Unwelcome sexual attention."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Deliberate intimidation, stalking or following."}),"
",e(r.li,{children:"Advocating for or encouraging any of the above."}),"
"]}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"5. Weapons Policy"}),"
",e(r.p,{children:"No weapons are allowed at WhatTheStack events or community spaces. This includes guns, explosives, and large knives."}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"6. Consequences of Unacceptable Behavior"}),"
",e(r.p,{children:"Unacceptable behavior will not be tolerated. Anyone asked to stop is expected to comply immediately. Organizers may take any action they deem appropriate, up to and including permanent expulsion from the community."}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"7. Reporting Guidelines"}),"
",i(r.p,{children:["If you witness or are subject to unacceptable behavior, notify a community organizer or contact us at ",e(r.a,{href:"mailto:what@wts.rocks",children:"what@wts.rocks"}),"."]}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"8. Addressing Grievances"}),"
",e(r.p,{children:"If you feel falsely or unfairly accused, notify the organizer with a concise description of your grievance."}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"9. Scope"}),"
",e(r.p,{children:"This code of conduct applies to all community participants in all community venues (online and in-person) and one-on-one communications pertaining to community business."}),"
",e(r.h3,{children:"10. Contact Information"}),"
",i(r.p,{children:["Email: ",e(r.a,{href:"mailto:what@wts.rocks",children:"what@wts.rocks"})]})]})}return{default:function(n={}){const{wrapper:i}=n.components||{};return i?e(i,{...n,children:e(_createMdxContent,{...n})}):_createMdxContent(n)}};

title: Convince Your Boss
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const o={a:"a",blockquote:"blockquote",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...r.components},{ConferenceDate:i,ConferenceLocation:a,GeneralContactEmail:s,RegularTicketPrice:c,StudentTicketPrice:h}=o;return i||_missingMdxReference("ConferenceDate",!0),a||_missingMdxReference("ConferenceLocation",!0),s||_missingMdxReference("GeneralContactEmail",!0),c||_missingMdxReference("RegularTicketPrice",!0),h||_missingMdxReference("StudentTicketPrice",!0),n(e,{children:[t(o.h2,{children:"Convince Your Boss"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Look, we get it. You're sold. You've been sold since you saw the lineup (or the food pics from last year). But your manager needs a bit more than "trust me, it's gonna be sick." Fair enough. Here's your ammo."}),"
",t(o.h2,{children:"Why WhatTheStack is worth it"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"WhatTheStack isn't your typical conference where someone reads their blog post off a slide deck. It's a single-day, multi-track deep dive into the things your team actually deals with - modern web architecture, AI/ML in production, infrastructure, DevOps, and the soft skills that keep teams from imploding. All of it, from people who've been in the trenches."}),"
",t(o.h2,{children:"What your company gets out of it"}),"
",t(o.h3,{children:"Fresh technical knowledge, applied the next day"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Your developer comes back with practical insights on topics like performance optimization, modern frontend architecture, backend scalability, AI integration, and infrastructure patterns. Not abstract theory - real approaches from engineers who run real systems in production. The kind of stuff that saves a team weeks of going down the wrong path."}),"
",t(o.h3,{children:"Cross-stack perspective"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Most conferences pick a lane. We don't. With 30+ talks across 4 tracks, your developer gets exposed to the full picture - frontend, backend, infrastructure, AI, and everything in between. That cross-pollination is how you end up with engineers who make better architectural decisions instead of just optimizing their corner."}),"
",t(o.h3,{children:"Access to the people behind the tools"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Speakers at WTS actively maintain production systems, frameworks, and widely-used open source projects. During breaks, lunch, and the afterparty, your developer can pick their brain directly. That kind of access doesn't come from a YouTube video."}),"
",t(o.h3,{children:"Networking that actually matters"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"800+ developers, from juniors to senior architects, from startups to enterprises. That's a room full of potential hires, collaborators, and people who've already solved the problem your team is stuck on. Every edition, we hear stories of people finding their next colleague or their next solution over a beer."}),"
",t(o.h3,{children:"Retention and morale"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Let's be honest - developers who feel invested in tend to stick around. Sending someone to a conference says "we care about your growth." That's cheaper than a recruitment process. Way cheaper."}),"
",t(o.h2,{children:"The numbers"}),"
",n(o.table,{children:[t(o.thead,{children:n(o.tr,{children:[t(o.th,{}),t(o.th,{})]})}),n(o.tbody,{children:[n(o.tr,{children:[t(o.td,{children:t(o.strong,{children:"Regular ticket"})}),t(o.td,{children:t(c,{})})]}),n(o.tr,{children:[t(o.td,{children:t(o.strong,{children:"Student ticket"})}),t(o.td,{children:t(h,{})})]}),n(o.tr,{children:[t(o.td,{children:t(o.strong,{children:"Duration"})}),n(o.td,{children:["1 day (",t(i,{}),")"]})]}),n(o.tr,{children:[t(o.td,{children:t(o.strong,{children:"Location"})}),t(o.td,{children:t(a,{})})]}),n(o.tr,{children:[t(o.td,{children:t(o.strong,{children:"Talks"})}),t(o.td,{children:"30+ across 4 tracks"})]}),n(o.tr,{children:[t(o.td,{children:t(o.strong,{children:"Workshops"})}),t(o.td,{children:"5+ (optional add-ons)"})]}),n(o.tr,{children:[t(o.td,{children:t(o.strong,{children:"Expected attendees"})}),t(o.td,{children:"800+"})]})]})]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"That's less than a team lunch in most cities. For a full day of technical content, workshops, food, drinks, and networking."}),"
",t(o.h2,{children:"What your developer brings back"}),"
",n(o.ul,{children:["
",t(o.li,{children:"Practical knowledge on current best practices across the stack"}),"
",t(o.li,{children:"New approaches to problems your team is actively working on"}),"
",t(o.li,{children:"Connections with other engineers and potential collaborators"}),"
",t(o.li,{children:"Motivation and fresh energy (yes, that has ROI too)"}),"
",t(o.li,{children:"Notes, ideas, and maybe a few controversial opinions about tabs vs spaces"}),"
"]}),"
",t(o.h2,{children:"The email you can copy-paste"}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Not sure how to bring it up? Here, we wrote it for you. Just copy, paste, and hit send."}),"
",t(o.hr,{}),"
",n(o.blockquote,{children:["
",t(o.p,{children:n(o.strong,{children:["Subject: Conference request - WhatTheStack 2026 (",t(i,{}),", ",t(a,{}),")"]})}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Hi [Manager's name],"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:["I'd like to attend WhatTheStack 2026, a software engineering conference in ",t(a,{})," on ",t(i,{}),". It covers the full stack - web, AI/ML, infrastructure, DevOps - with 30+ talks across 4 tracks, plus hands-on workshops."]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"The speakers are practitioners who maintain production systems and widely-used open source tools, so the content is directly applicable to what we're building. Topics like [mention 1-2 relevant areas for your team] are especially relevant to our current work."}),"
",n(o.p,{children:["The ticket is ",t(c,{}),", which includes all talks, food, and drinks for the full day. There are also optional paid workshops available as add-ons. I'd be happy to share a summary of key takeaways with the team afterward."]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:["Here's the website: ",t(o.a,{href:"https://wts.sh",children:"wts.sh"})]}),"
",t(o.p,{children:"Let me know what you think!"}),"
"]}),"
",t(o.hr,{}),"
",t(o.h2,{children:"Volume discounts"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:["Sending a group? We offer volume discounts and invoicing for teams. Reach out at ",t(s,{})," and we'll sort it out."]}),"
",t(o.h2,{children:"Still need more convincing?"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:["We can't help you there - but ",t(o.a,{href:"https://www.youtube.com/@WhatTheStackConference",children:"last year's talks on YouTube"})," might. Show your boss a few of those and let the content speak for itself."]})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};function _missingMdxReference(e,t){throw new Error("Expected "+(t?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}

title: Partner With Us
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(t){const d={a:"a",code:"code",em:"em",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",hr:"hr",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",table:"table",tbody:"tbody",td:"td",th:"th",thead:"thead",tr:"tr",ul:"ul",...t.components};return r(e,{children:[n(d.h2,{children:"Partner With Us"}),"
",r(d.p,{children:["WhatTheStack is the largest international developer conference in the region, held annually in Skopje, North Macedonia. With ",n(d.strong,{children:"800+ attendees"}),", ",n(d.strong,{children:"4 stages"}),", ",n(d.strong,{children:"30+ speakers"}),", and a full week of pre-event activities, it's the ultimate dev conference and the biggest tech event in the local dev community."]}),"
",n(d.p,{children:"As a truly community-driven conference, WTS attracts everyone from experienced industry professionals, engineers, and designers to passionate students, companies, and IT communities pushing boundaries across the region."}),"
",n(d.hr,{}),"
",n(d.h2,{children:"Partnership Packages"}),"
",n(d.p,{children:"We offer four tiers for companies looking to partner with WhatTheStack 2026:"}),"

(limited)"})}),n(d.td,{children:"—"}),n(d.td,{children:"Yes"}),n(d.td,{children:"Yes"}),n(d.td,{children:"Yes"})]})]})]}),"
",n(d.p,{children:n(d.em,{children:"Possibility to be a coffee partner, food partner, speaker's dinner partner, or after-party partner."})}),"
",n(d.p,{children:n(d.a,{href:"/wts-partnership-proposal-2026.pdf",children:"> Download the full Partnership Proposal (PDF)"})}),"
",n(d.hr,{}),"
",n(d.h2,{children:"Community Partnerships"}),"
",n(d.p,{children:"Are you a dev community, meetup group, or student organization? We have a dedicated community partnership track — no cost, just collaboration."}),"
",n(d.h3,{children:"What You Get"}),"
",r(d.ul,{children:["
",r(d.li,{children:[n(d.strong,{children:"2 Free All-Access Passes"})," — Use them however you like (giveaway, team members, etc.). Need more? Let's talk."]}),"
",r(d.li,{children:[n(d.strong,{children:"10% Discount Code"})," — We'll set up a custom promo code (e.g., ",n(d.code,{children:"YOURCOMMUNITY10"}),") so your members get 10% off their tickets."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(d.h3,{children:"What We Ask"}),"
",n(d.p,{children:"Help us spread the word:"}),"
",r(d.ul,{children:["
",r(d.li,{children:[n(d.strong,{children:"Share the Event"})," — Post the event + your discount code in your newsletter, Discord, or Slack."]}),"
",r(d.li,{children:[n(d.strong,{children:"Spread the Word on Social"})," — Mention us on your social channels before the event (we'll provide a media kit)."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(d.p,{children:"Got other ideas for collaboration? We're all ears."}),"
",n(d.p,{children:n(d.a,{href:"/wts-community-partnership-2026.pdf",children:"> Download the Community Partnership Info (PDF)"})}),"
",n(d.hr,{}),"
",n(d.h2,{children:"Ready?"}),"
",n(d.p,{children:"If you're in, email us your logo and tell us what you'd like to do together."}),"
",n(d.h3,{children:"Contact Us"}),"
",n(d.p,{children:n(d.a,{href:"mailto:what@wts.sh",children:"> Send us an email at what@wts.sh"})}),"
",r(d.p,{children:[n(d.strong,{children:"wts.sh"})," | ",n(d.strong,{children:n(d.a,{href:"mailto:what@wts.sh",children:"what@wts.sh"})})]})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:r}=e.components||{};return r?n(r,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Privacy Policy
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(r){const i={a:"a",h1:"h1",h3:"h3",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...r.components};return t(e,{children:[n(i.h1,{children:"Privacy Policy"}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"Privacy policy for WhatTheStack conference - how we handle your data"}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"Our Approach to Privacy"}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"At WhatTheStack, we believe in transparency and minimalism when it comes to data collection. We only collect what’s absolutely necessary to provide you with the best conference experience."}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"What Data We Collect"}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"We collect and process the following limited information:"}),"
",t(i.ul,{children:["
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Name:"})," To identify you during the conference and on your ticket"]}),"
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Email address:"})," For important conference communications and updates"]}),"
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Company/Affiliation:"})," For your conference badge and basic analytics"]}),"
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Ticket information:"})," To verify your attendance"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"How We Use Your Data"}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"Your data is used exclusively for:"}),"
",t(i.ul,{children:["
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Conference Administration:"})," Ticket verification, attendee identification, emergency communications, and important updates."]}),"
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Communication:"})," Pre-conference information, schedule updates, and post-conference feedback requests."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"Consent and Voluntary Data Sharing"}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"You may, at your sole discretion, elect to provide certain personal data to our conference partners, sponsors, or exhibitors. Such disclosures may occur, for example, by participating in giveaways, scanning QR codes, or opting in to receive communications. By doing so, you acknowledge and expressly consent to the transfer of your personal data to the relevant partner."}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"Data Protection"}),"
",t(i.ul,{children:["
",n(i.li,{children:"We do not sell your personal information."}),"
",n(i.li,{children:"We do not share your data with third parties without your permission."}),"
",n(i.li,{children:"We do not use your data for marketing purposes beyond the scope of the conference."}),"
",n(i.li,{children:"We do not track or profile our attendees."}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"Third-Party Services"}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"We use the following third-party services:"}),"
",t(i.ul,{children:["
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Hi.events (hi.events):"})," For ticket sales and registration, via a self-hosted instance."]}),"
",t(i.li,{children:[n(i.strong,{children:"Stripe:"})," For payment processing."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"Your Rights"}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"You have the right to access, request correction, or request deletion of your personal data. You may also withdraw your consent at any time."}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"Data Retention"}),"
",n(i.p,{children:"We retain your data only for as long as necessary to facilitate your attendance, complete post-conference communications, and comply with legal obligations."}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"Requesting Data Deletion"}),"
",t(i.p,{children:["You can request deletion by emailing ",n(i.a,{href:"mailto:what@wts.rocks",children:"what@wts.rocks"}),' with "Data Deletion Request" in the subject line.']}),"
",n(i.h3,{children:"Contact Us"}),"
",t(i.p,{children:["Email: ",n(i.a,{href:"mailto:what@wts.rocks",children:"what@wts.rocks"}),"
Phone: +389 78 397 359
Address: 75 East 3rd Street Sheridan, WY 82801 United States"]})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?n(t,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Speaker Guide
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:r}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const o={a:"a",h2:"h2",h3:"h3",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components},{ConferenceDate:t,ConferenceLocation:a,GeneralContactEmail:s}=o;return t||_missingMdxReference("ConferenceDate",!0),a||_missingMdxReference("ConferenceLocation",!0),s||_missingMdxReference("GeneralContactEmail",!0),r(e,{children:[n(o.h2,{children:"WTS 2026 Speaker Guide"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Hi there!"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"We're excited to have you speaking at WhatTheStack 2026. Thank you for sharing your time and experience with the community. This guide covers the practical details for preparing your session and getting to Skopje."}),"
",r(o.p,{children:["This is a working guide. We will update the items marked ",n(o.strong,{children:"to be announced"})," as the remaining plans are confirmed, and we will send speakers any time-sensitive details directly."]}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"At a Glance"}),"
",r(o.ul,{children:["
",r(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Conference:"})," WhatTheStack 2026"]}),"
",r(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Date:"})," ",n(t,{})]}),"
",r(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Location:"})," ",n(a,{})]}),"
",r(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Main venue:"})," To be announced"]}),"
",r(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Pre-conference venue:"})," Base42 Hackerspace, Rimska 25, 1000 Skopje"]}),"
",r(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Speaker dinner:"})," Date, time, and venue to be announced"]}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"Contact"}),"
",r(o.p,{children:["Email ",n(s,{})," to reach the organizing team. Use this address for travel coordination, accessibility needs, dietary requirements, talk updates, and anything else we should know."]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"We will share the private 2026 speaker chat directly once it is ready. Please do not use the 2025 speaker-group link."}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"Travel, Accommodation, and Expenses"}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Expenses"}),"
",r(o.p,{children:["We will cover your travel and accommodation expenses in full unless your employer has agreed to cover them. If your employer is covering your expenses, we will be happy to recognize them as a conference supporter. Companies interested in further support can also see our ",n(o.a,{href:"/partnerships",children:"partnership options"}),"."]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Keep the invoices and receipts from your reservations; we will share reimbursement instructions directly. Send us your itinerary once it is booked so we can coordinate the rest of your stay."}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Accommodation"}),"
",r(o.p,{children:["We will coordinate your hotel booking with you. The hotel and standard booking window are ",n(o.strong,{children:"to be announced"}),". Send us your arrival and departure dates, whether you are traveling with someone, and any room or accessibility requirements as early as possible."]}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Getting to Skopje"}),"
",r(o.p,{children:[n(o.a,{href:"https://maps.app.goo.gl/5sHodsHU3Y7GCmwSA",children:"Skopje International Airport (SKP)"})," is about a 30-minute drive from the city center. Skopje is also reachable by bus from neighboring countries."]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Send us your arrival and departure details once booked. Airport transfer arrangements will be confirmed closer to the conference. If you need a visa invitation letter or other travel documentation, tell us as early as possible."}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Food and Dietary Requirements"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Food and drinks are provided throughout the conference day. Vegetarian and vegan options will be available. Tell us about allergies, dietary restrictions, or other requirements so we can plan for them."}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Pre-conference Activities"}),"
",r(o.p,{children:["We are planning workshops, warmup events, and a community gathering before the main conference. The schedule is ",n(o.strong,{children:"to be announced"}),". If you would like to host a workshop, join another event, or spend extra time exploring Skopje, let us know."]}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Bringing a Guest"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"If you would like to bring a +1, contact the organizing team and we will help arrange their conference ticket."}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"Your Session"}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Talk Details"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Your title, abstract, key takeaways, biography, photo, and social links may be used on the website and in conference promotion. Please respond promptly when we ask you to confirm them. Talk ideas can evolve, but check with us before making a substantial change to the accepted topic."}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"WTS talks should give the audience useful ideas, honest experience, or practical takeaways. Mentioning a product you work on is fine when it supports the story; a product or sales pitch is not."}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Session Formats"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Your acceptance and agenda slot will identify your format:"}),"
",r(o.ul,{children:["
",r(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Main-stage session:"})," 35 minutes total. The usual split is 25 minutes for the talk and 10 minutes for Q&A, but you may use the full slot for the talk or choose another split."]}),"
",r(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Short-format session:"})," 15 minutes for the talk and 5 minutes for Q&A."]}),"
",r(o.li,{children:[n(o.strong,{children:"Workshop or special format:"})," We will confirm the length and setup with you directly."]}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Please finish within your assigned slot so the next speaker and the audience can move between sessions on time. If you are unsure which format you have, ask us before building your final deck."}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Recording"}),"
",r(o.p,{children:["Conference presentations are recorded and published after the event on the ",n(o.a,{href:"https://www.youtube.com/@WhatTheStackConference",children:"WhatTheStack YouTube channel"}),". Contact us before the conference if your session contains material that creates a recording concern."]}),"
",n(o.h3,{children:"Equipment and Demos"}),"
",r(o.ul,{children:["
",n(o.li,{children:"Plan to present from your own laptop."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"The current presentation plan supports HDMI and USB-C connections, subject to final venue confirmation."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Bring your laptop charger and any adapter you already trust."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Tell us in advance about audio, network, live-demo, accessibility, or other technical requirements."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Bring an offline copy of your slides and a backup plan for any network-dependent demo."}),"
"]}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"We will share the final room setup, slide handoff process, speaker check-in time, and on-stage support details when the venue plan is complete."}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"Accessibility and Code of Conduct"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"Tell us about any accessibility requirement that would make your travel, hotel stay, preparation, or time on stage easier. We would rather plan early than improvise on the day."}),"
",r(o.p,{children:["Everyone taking part in WTS must follow the ",n(o.a,{href:"/code-of-conduct",children:"Code of Conduct"}),". If you experience or witness a problem, contact an organizer or email ",n(o.a,{href:"mailto:what@wts.rocks",children:"what@wts.rocks"}),"."]}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"Helping Us Spread the Word"}),"
",n(o.p,{children:"We appreciate speakers sharing their announcement and session details with their communities. We will provide promotional assets you can use. If you would like to record a short preview of your talk or collaborate on another piece of content, let us know."}),"
",n(o.h2,{children:"Before You Travel"}),"
",r(o.ul,{children:["
",n(o.li,{children:"Confirm your public profile and session details."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Confirm your session format and timing."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Send us your itinerary once it is booked."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Send us your arrival, departure, dietary, and accessibility details."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Keep all travel invoices and receipts."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Share technical requirements and test your adapters."}),"
",n(o.li,{children:"Pack an offline copy of your slides and demos."}),"
"]}),"
",r(o.p,{children:["We're looking forward to having you at WhatTheStack 2026. If anything in this guide is unclear, email ",n(s,{})," and we will sort it out together."]})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:r}=e.components||{};return r?n(r,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};function _missingMdxReference(e,n){throw new Error("Expected "+(n?"component":"object")+" `"+e+"` to be defined: you likely forgot to import, pass, or provide it.")}

title: Terms and Conditions
content:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:n,jsxs:t}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={a:"a",h1:"h1",h3:"h3",h4:"h4",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return t(e,{children:[n(r.h1,{children:"Terms and Conditions"}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"1. Introduction"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Welcome to the “WhatTheStack?” Conference organized by DeveD, Base42 and Angular Macedonia. The ticket sales for this conference are facilitated by Hi.events (hi.events) via a self-hosted instance and Stripe. By purchasing a ticket and participating in the conference, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions."}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"2. Organizer Information"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"The “WhatTheStack?” Conference is organized by:"}),"
",t(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:"DeveD"}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Base42"}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Angular Macedonia"}),"
"]}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Sales are facilitated by:"}),"
",t(r.ul,{children:["
",t(r.li,{children:["A self-hosted instance of hi.events (",n(r.a,{href:"https://hi.events",children:"https://hi.events"}),")"]}),"
",n(r.li,{children:"Stripe"}),"
"]}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["The legal entity behind the conference is ",n(r.strong,{children:"CodePub LLC"}),", registered in the United States, with address:
75 East 3rd Street Sheridan, WY 82801 United States"]}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"3. Ticket Purchase"}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"3.1 General"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Tickets for the conference can be purchased online through Hi.eventt (hi.events) and Stripe. All ticket sales are final, and no refunds will be issued."}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"3.2 Payment"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"All payments are processed securely through our HiEvents instance and Stripe. By purchasing a ticket, you agree to their respective terms of service and privacy policies."}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"3.3 Confirmation"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Upon successful payment, you will receive a confirmation email with your ticket. Please ensure that your email address is accurate during the registration process."}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"3.4 Re-assigning tickets"}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["Tickets can be re-assigned to another person by contacting the organizers at ",n(r.a,{href:"mailto:what@wts.rocks",children:"what@wts.rocks"}),". Alternatively, you can re-assign your ticket to another person by changing the email address and contact details on via our HiEvents instance, using the ticket link."]}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"4. Cancellations and Refunds"}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"4.1 Organizer Cancellation"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"In the unlikely event that the conference is canceled by the organizers, ticket holders will receive a full refund. The organizers are not responsible for any additional expenses incurred by ticket holders."}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"4.2 Attendee Cancellation"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"All ticket sales are final, and no refunds will be issued for attendee cancellations."}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"5. Code of Conduct"}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"5.1 Expected Behavior"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"All attendees, speakers, sponsors, and volunteers at the conference are required to agree with the code of conduct. Organizers will enforce this code throughout the event. We expect cooperation from all participants to help ensure a safe environment for everybody."}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"5.2 Unacceptable Behavior"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Harassment of any kind, including but not limited to verbal abuse, discrimination, and inappropriate physical contact, will not be tolerated. Any attendee violating these rules may be sanctioned or expelled from the conference without a refund at the discretion of the organizers."}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"6. Liability"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"The organizers do not accept responsibility for any personal injury, loss, or damage to property during the event. Attendees are responsible for their own belongings."}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"7. Privacy Policy"}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"7.1 Data Collection"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"By purchasing a ticket, you consent to the collection and processing of your personal data for the purposes of event registration and communication. This data may include your name, email address, and payment information."}),"
",n(r.h4,{children:"7.2 Data Usage"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"Your personal data will be used to facilitate your attendance at the conference and to provide you with information about the event. Your data will not be shared with third parties without your explicit consent, except as required by law."}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"8. Changes to Terms and Conditions"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"The organizers reserve the right to update and change these terms and conditions at any time. Any changes will be posted on the official conference website, and it is your responsibility to review them periodically. We'll do our best to notify you of any changes in a timely manner."}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"9. Consent to Recording"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"By attending the conference, you consent to being photographed, filmed, and recorded. These images, videos, and audio recordings may be used by the organizers for promotional and marketing purposes. If you do not wish to be photographed or recorded, please notify the organizers upon arrival, and they will provide you with a sign indicating your preference."}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"10. Governing Law"}),"
",n(r.p,{children:"The terms and conditions specifically related to the conference are governed by the laws of the Republic of Macedonia. Any disputes arising from or in connection with these conference-specific terms and conditions will be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of the Republic of Macedonia."}),"
",n(r.h3,{children:"11. Contact Information"}),"
",t(r.p,{children:["For any questions regarding these terms and conditions, please contact us at:
",n(r.strong,{children:"CodePub LLC"}),"
Email: ",n(r.a,{href:"mailto:what@wts.rocks",children:"what@wts.rocks"}),"
Phone: +389 78 397 359
Address: 75 East 3rd Street Sheridan, WY 82801 United States"]})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:t}=e.components||{};return t?n(t,{...e,children:n(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};
